list.name: board
list.label: Quadro
list.query: SELECT name AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM jira_boards ORDER BY name

list.name: sprint
list.label: Sprint
list.query: SELECT name || ' [' || state || ']' AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM jira_sprints WHERE ('$board' = '0' OR board_id = '$board'::integer) AND state IN (${sprint_state:sqlstring}) ORDER BY COALESCE(start_date, '1970-01-01') DESC

list.name: issue_type
list.label: Tipo de Card
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT ji.issue_type AS __text, ji.issue_type AS __value FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint AND jsi.active = TRUE AND ji.issue_type IS NOT NULL AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Sub-task', 'Subtask', 'Subtarefa') ORDER BY ji.issue_type

panels.title: Período da Sprint

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(start_date AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM') || ' → ' || TO_CHAR(end_date AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS "Período"
FROM jira_sprints WHERE id = $sprint::integer

panels.description: Datas de início e fim da sprint selecionada (start_date → end_date), conforme cadastrado no Jira.

panels.title: Bugs na Sprint

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS "Bugs",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ji.status_category = 'done') AS "Concluídos"
FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
  AND jsi.active = TRUE
  AND ji.issue_type = 'Bug'

panels.description: Quantidade total de cards do tipo Bug vinculados à sprint (ativos), independente do status atual. Indica o esforço investido em correção de defeitos dentro da sprint. A query também expõe a coluna "Concluídos" (bugs com status_category = 'done') — altere 'Fields' na reduceOptions para exibir outro recorte.

panels.title: Total de Cards

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Total"
FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
  AND jsi.active = TRUE
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')

panels.description: Total de cards vinculados à sprint (excluindo subtasks) na tabela jira_sprint_issues, independente do status atual.

panels.title: Cards Concluídos

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Concluídos"
FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
  AND jsi.active = TRUE
  AND ji.status_category = 'done'
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')

panels.description: Cards da sprint com status_category = 'done' (excluindo subtasks). Inclui cards resolvidos dentro ou após o período da sprint, reflete o estado atual, não o histórico.

panels.title: Story Points Planejados

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ji.story_points), 0)::int AS "SP Planejados"
FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
  AND jsi.active = TRUE
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')

panels.description: Soma dos story points de todos os cards vinculados à sprint (excluindo subtasks), incluindo os não concluídos. Cards sem estimativa de SP não contribuem para este total.

panels.title: Story Points Entregues

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ji.story_points), 0)::int AS "SP Entregues"
FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
  AND jsi.active = TRUE
  AND ji.status_category = 'done'
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')

panels.description: Soma dos story points exclusivamente dos cards com status_category = 'done' (excluindo subtasks). Divergência entre SP Planejados e Entregues indica variação de escopo ou estimativas incorretas.

panels.title: Taxa de Conclusão

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ji.status_category = 'done') /
    NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS "Conclusão %"
FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
  AND jsi.active = TRUE
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')

panels.description: Percentual de cards concluídos (status_category = 'done') em relação ao total da sprint. Calculado por contagem de cards, não por story points. Meta ideal: 100%. Valores abaixo de 80% consecutivos indicam problemas de planejamento ou capacidade.

panels.title: Taxa de Andamento

targets.rawSql:
WITH sprint_items AS (
  SELECT ji.issue_key, ji.status_category, ji.issue_type, ji.parent_key
  FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
  JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
  WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
    AND jsi.active = TRUE
),
parents_with_subtasks AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT si.parent_key
  FROM sprint_items si
  WHERE si.issue_type IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
    AND si.parent_key IS NOT NULL
),
countable AS (
  -- subtasks + issues standalone (sem subtasks na sprint)
  SELECT si.issue_key, si.status_category
  FROM sprint_items si
  WHERE si.issue_key NOT IN (SELECT parent_key FROM parents_with_subtasks)
)
SELECT
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_category = 'done') /
    NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS "Andamento %"
FROM countable

panels.description: Percentual de andamento real: conta apenas issues sem subtasks e subtasks individuais. Issues-pai cujas subtasks estão na sprint são excluídas para evitar contagem dupla. Reflete o progresso granular do trabalho.

panels.title: Burndown: Cards Restantes
panels.description: Linha real (vermelho): cards da sprint ainda não concluídos em cada dia, calculado como total de cards menos os resolvidos (resolved_at) até aquela data. Linha ideal (cinza tracejado): decréscimo linear do total até zero no end_date da sprint. Computado via generate_series SQL, sem tabela de snapshots diários.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
sp AS (
  SELECT id, start_date, end_date
  FROM jira_sprints
  WHERE id = $sprint
),
days AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    date_trunc('day', (SELECT start_date FROM sp)),
    date_trunc('day', LEAST((SELECT end_date FROM sp), NOW())),
    '1 day'::interval
  ) AS day
),
sprint_cards AS (
  SELECT ji.issue_key, ji.resolved_at
  FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
  JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
  WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
    AND jsi.active = TRUE
    AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
),
scope AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM sprint_cards
)
SELECT
  d.day AS time,
  sc.total - COUNT(c.issue_key) FILTER (
    WHERE c.resolved_at IS NOT NULL
    AND date_trunc('day', c.resolved_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') <= d.day
    AND date_trunc('day', c.resolved_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') >= (SELECT date_trunc('day', start_date) FROM sp)
  ) AS "Restantes",
  GREATEST(0, ROUND(sc.total * (
    1.0 - LEAST(1.0,
      EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (d.day - date_trunc('day', (SELECT start_date FROM sp)))) /
      NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (date_trunc('day', (SELECT end_date FROM sp)) - date_trunc('day', (SELECT start_date FROM sp)))), 0)
    )
  ))) AS "Ideal"
FROM days d
CROSS JOIN scope sc
LEFT JOIN sprint_cards c ON TRUE
GROUP BY d.day, sc.total
ORDER BY d.day

panels.title: Burndown: Story Points Restantes
panels.description: Linha real (laranja): SP da sprint ainda não entregues em cada dia, SP total menos SP de cards com resolved_at até aquela data. Linha ideal (cinza tracejado): decréscimo linear do SP total até zero no end_date. Computado via generate_series SQL, sem tabela de snapshots diários.

targets.rawSql:
WITH
sp AS (
  SELECT id, start_date, end_date
  FROM jira_sprints
  WHERE id = $sprint
),
days AS (
  SELECT generate_series(
    date_trunc('day', (SELECT start_date FROM sp)),
    date_trunc('day', LEAST((SELECT end_date FROM sp), NOW())),
    '1 day'::interval
  ) AS day
),
sprint_cards AS (
  SELECT ji.issue_key, ji.resolved_at, ji.story_points
  FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
  JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
  WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
    AND jsi.active = TRUE
    AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
),
scope AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(story_points), 0) AS total_sp FROM sprint_cards
)
SELECT
  d.day AS time,
  GREATEST(0, sc.total_sp - COALESCE(SUM(c.story_points) FILTER (
    WHERE c.resolved_at IS NOT NULL
    AND date_trunc('day', c.resolved_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') <= d.day
    AND date_trunc('day', c.resolved_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') >= (SELECT date_trunc('day', start_date) FROM sp)
  ), 0)) AS "SP Restantes",
  GREATEST(0, ROUND((sc.total_sp * (
    1.0 - LEAST(1.0,
      EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (d.day - date_trunc('day', (SELECT start_date FROM sp)))) /
      NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (date_trunc('day', (SELECT end_date FROM sp)) - date_trunc('day', (SELECT start_date FROM sp)))), 0)
    )
  ))::numeric, 1)) AS "Ideal SP"
FROM days d
CROSS JOIN scope sc
LEFT JOIN sprint_cards c ON TRUE
GROUP BY d.day, sc.total_sp
ORDER BY d.day

panels.title: Cards por Status

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ji.status AS "Status",
  COUNT(*) AS "Cards"
FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
  AND jsi.active = TRUE
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
GROUP BY ji.status, ji.status_category
ORDER BY
  CASE ji.status_category
    WHEN 'new' THEN 1
    WHEN 'indeterminate' THEN 2
    WHEN 'done' THEN 3
    ELSE 4
  END,
  COUNT(*) DESC

panels.description: Quantidade de cards da sprint agrupados pelo status atual (excluindo subtasks). Ordenado pela categoria do fluxo: A Fazer -> Em Progresso -> Concluido.

panels.title: Qtd de Cards por Responsável

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(ji.assignee, '(sem responsável)') AS "Responsável",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ji.status_category = 'done')          AS "Concluídos",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ji.status_category = 'indeterminate') AS "Em Progresso",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ji.status_category = 'new')           AS "A Fazer"
FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
  AND jsi.active = TRUE
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
GROUP BY ji.assignee
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

panels.description: Cards da sprint por responsável (excluindo subtasks), empilhados por categoria de status: done (verde) / indeterminate (em andamento, amarelo) / new (a fazer + backlog, azul). Permite visualizar progresso e carga de trabalho individual dentro da sprint.

panels.title: Story Points por Responsável

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(ji.assignee, '(sem responsável)') AS "Responsável",
  COALESCE(SUM(ji.story_points) FILTER (WHERE ji.status_category = 'done'),         0)::int AS "SP Entregues",
  COALESCE(SUM(ji.story_points) FILTER (WHERE ji.status_category = 'indeterminate'), 0)::int AS "SP Em Progresso",
  COALESCE(SUM(ji.story_points) FILTER (WHERE ji.status_category = 'new'),           0)::int AS "SP A Fazer"
FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
  AND jsi.active = TRUE
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
GROUP BY ji.assignee
ORDER BY SUM(COALESCE(ji.story_points, 0)) DESC

panels.description: SP da sprint distribuídos por responsável (excluindo subtasks), separados por categoria de status: entregues (done) / em andamento (indeterminate) / a fazer + backlog (new). Mostra a contribuição e progresso de cada pessoa em termos de esforço estimado.

panels.title: Cards da Sprint

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ji.issue_key                                      AS "Card",
  LEFT(ji.summary, 80)                              AS "Título",
  COALESCE(ji.issue_type, '-')                      AS "Tipo",
  ji.status                                         AS "Status",
  ji.status_category                                AS "Status Cat",
  COALESCE(ji.assignee, '(sem responsável)')        AS "Responsável",
  COALESCE(ji.story_points::text, '-')              AS "SP",
  COALESCE(ROUND(ji.lead_time_hours::numeric, 0)::text || 'h', '-') AS "Lead Time"
FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
  AND jsi.active = TRUE
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
ORDER BY
  CASE ji.status_category
    WHEN 'new'           THEN 1
    WHEN 'indeterminate' THEN 2
    WHEN 'done'          THEN 3
    ELSE 4
  END,
  ji.assignee NULLS LAST,
  ji.issue_key

panels.description: Lista completa de todos os cards da sprint com: chave, título (80 chars), tipo, status atual, categoria de status, responsável, story points e lead time em horas. Lead time = created_at → resolved_at (ou até hoje, se ainda em aberto). Ordenado por status_category (done por último) para destacar o que ainda precisa de atenção.

panels.title: Cards Concluídos por Sprint

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  js.name AS "Sprint",
  COUNT(jsi.issue_key) FILTER (WHERE ji.status_category = 'done') AS "Cards Concluídos"
FROM jira_sprints js
LEFT JOIN jira_sprint_issues jsi ON jsi.sprint_id = js.id AND jsi.active = TRUE
LEFT JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE js.state IN ('active', 'closed')
  AND ('$board' = '0' OR js.board_id = '$board'::integer)
  AND (ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa') OR ji.issue_type IS NULL)
GROUP BY js.id, js.name, js.start_date
ORDER BY js.start_date NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

panels.description: Quantidade de cards com status_category = 'done' por sprint (excluindo subtasks), ordenado por data de início. Referência histórica de velocidade de entrega do time, limitado às 20 sprints mais recentes do quadro. Sprints com variação grande de entrega indicam instabilidade de capacidade ou escopo.

panels.title: Story Points por Sprint

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  js.name AS "Sprint",
  COALESCE(SUM(ji.story_points) FILTER (WHERE ji.status_category = 'done'),         0)::int AS "SP Entregues",
  COALESCE(SUM(ji.story_points) FILTER (WHERE ji.status_category != 'done'),         0)::int AS "SP Não Entregues"
FROM jira_sprints js
LEFT JOIN jira_sprint_issues jsi ON jsi.sprint_id = js.id AND jsi.active = TRUE
LEFT JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE js.state IN ('active', 'closed')
  AND ('$board' = '0' OR js.board_id = '$board'::integer)
  AND (ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa') OR ji.issue_type IS NULL)
GROUP BY js.id, js.name, js.start_date
ORDER BY js.start_date NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

panels.description: SP entregues (done) vs SP não entregues (não done) por sprint (excluindo subtasks), empilhados. Mostra consistência da velocidade em termos de esforço estimado e taxa de cumprimento dos objetivos. Limitado às 20 sprints mais recentes do quadro selecionado.

panels.title: Cards Removidos

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Removidos"
FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
  AND jsi.active = FALSE
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')

panels.description: Cards que foram removidos da sprint (transbordo). Estes cards estavam originalmente na sprint mas foram retirados antes do fechamento.

panels.title: SP Removidos

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ji.story_points), 0)::int AS "SP Removidos"
FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
  AND jsi.active = FALSE
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')

panels.description: Soma dos story points dos cards removidos da sprint. Indica quanto esforço estimado foi retirado (transbordo).

panels.title: Transbordo por Sprint (Histórico)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  js.name AS "Sprint",
  COUNT(jsi.issue_key) FILTER (WHERE jsi.active = FALSE) AS "Cards Removidos",
  COALESCE(SUM(ji.story_points) FILTER (WHERE jsi.active = FALSE), 0)::int AS "SP Removidos"
FROM jira_sprints js
LEFT JOIN jira_sprint_issues jsi ON jsi.sprint_id = js.id
LEFT JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE js.state IN ('active', 'closed')
  AND ('$board' = '0' OR js.board_id = '$board'::integer)
  AND (ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa') OR ji.issue_type IS NULL)
GROUP BY js.id, js.name, js.start_date
HAVING COUNT(jsi.issue_key) FILTER (WHERE jsi.active = FALSE) > 0
ORDER BY js.start_date NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

panels.description: Quantidade de cards e story points removidos por sprint (transbordo). Mostra padrões de remoção de escopo ao longo do tempo. Sprints com alto transbordo recorrente indicam problemas de planejamento.

panels.title: Cards Removidos da Sprint

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ji.issue_key                                      AS "Card",
  LEFT(ji.summary, 80)                              AS "Título",
  COALESCE(ji.issue_type, '-')                      AS "Tipo",
  ji.status                                         AS "Status",
  COALESCE(ji.assignee, '(sem responsável)')        AS "Responsável",
  COALESCE(ji.story_points::text, '-')              AS "SP",
  TO_CHAR(jsi.removed_at, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI')    AS "Removido em"
FROM jira_sprint_issues jsi
JOIN jira_issues ji ON jsi.issue_key = ji.issue_key
WHERE jsi.sprint_id = $sprint
  AND jsi.active = FALSE
  AND ji.issue_type NOT IN ('Subtask', 'Sub-task', 'Subtarefa')
ORDER BY jsi.removed_at DESC

panels.description: Lista completa dos cards removidos da sprint (transbordo), com data de remoção. Permite rastrear exatamente quais cards saíram e quando.
